chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3614 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "غِنًى يَحْجُزُكَ عَنِ اَلظُّلْمِ خَيْرٌ مِنْ فَقْرٍ يَحْمِلُكَ عَلَى اَلْإِثْمِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3614 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Wealth that prevents you from committing oppression is better than poverty that leads you to sin."
